The context

With hiring & budgets tightening, L&D is the central engine for growth.

Your people team is being asked to build critical skills, improve performance, retain top talent, and drive internal growth — all at once, with fewer resources.

Our approach

Blinkist bridges this gap.

Accessible + Actionable + Social = Impact

Drive impact at three levels.

A learning system designed to compound growth — building the individual skills, team dynamics and organizational capabilities that move the business forward.

Individual

Build capability, one habit at a time.

Confidence grows as people apply what they learn in the flow of work — not in a classroom.

Confidence Better decision making Time-to-proficiency
Team

Shared language, shared behaviours.

Cohort-based learning creates alignment. Teams improve communication, feedback and accountability together.

Communication Peer accountability Reduced feedback loops
Organization

A performance flywheel.

Leadership capability compounds. Talent density rises. Churn drops. Agility becomes a repeatable process.

Leadership capability High talent density Reduced churn Agility

Case Study · Perlego

Transformative results in just one quarter with Blinkist Coaching.

Perlego rolled out Blinkist Group Coaching to managers to build role-model leadership behaviours. In a single quarter, employee sentiment on manager effectiveness moved from negative to strongly positive.

+41
points up on
the NPS scale
We have seen a lot of growth with ratings for questions like “My manager is a great role model for me and our employees.” Going from a score of minus nine to a positive thirty two.
Katie Downes
Head of People, Perlego
Platform demo · 15–20 minutes

What we'll explore live

A guided tour through the three surfaces your people will use every day — and the one admin console that ties it all together.

📱

The learner experience

Personalized pathways, micro-learning in the flow of work, and book, podcast & course summaries across iOS, Android and web.

🎯

Skill Pathways

Assign curated skill journeys, track completion & application, and align content to your competency model — built in minutes.

🤝

Coaching & Masterclasses

Live cohort-based experiences with coaches, authors and experts — from all-hands Masterclasses to cohorts of 10.

Seamless integration

Compatible with any LMS, LXP or intranet.

Run Blinkist as a standalone learning experience — or plug it into your existing stack. Most customers do both.

  • → Integrate Blinkist content with your existing tech
  • → SCORM-compliant and ready to go
  • → Super-simple tech set-up — SSO, API, off you go

Give learners Blinkist directly on our app and web — or let them access it from inside the tools they already use. Your stack, your call.
